datasets.name: 0d133447
queryLines:
SELECT
    dl.city,
    dl.population,
    dl.n_stations,
    dl.monitoring_density_score,
    ROUND(AVG(faqd.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(faqd.pm25_median) / 15.0 * 1, 1) AS pct_of_who_limit,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN faqd.pm25_median > 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS exceedance_pct,
    dl.population AS population_at_risk,
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(faqd.pm25_median) > 35 THEN 'CRITICAL - IMMEDIATE ACTION'
        WHEN AVG(faqd.pm25_median) > 25 THEN 'HIGH - PRIORITY'
        WHEN AVG(faqd.pm25_median) > 15 THEN 'MODERATE - MONITOR'
        ELSE 'LOW - MAINTAIN'
    END AS intervention_priority
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily faqd
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_locations dl
ON faqd.country = dl.country
WHERE dl.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY dl.city, dl.population, dl.n_stations, dl.monitoring_density_score
ORDER BY avg_pm25 DESC;

datasets.name: 396a128c
queryLines:
-- Query 1B: Infrastructure investment prioritization matrix
SELECT 
    l.city,
    l.population,
    l.n_stations,
    l.population_per_station,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
    -- Calculate optimal station count (target: 500K people per station)
    CEIL(l.population / 500000.0) AS recommended_stations,
    CEIL(l.population / 500000.0) - l.n_stations AS stations_needed,
    -- Investment priority score (pollution severity × infrastructure gap)
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median) * (l.population_per_station / 1000000.0), 2) AS investment_priority_score
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_locations l ON f.country = l.country
WHERE f.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY l.city, l.population, l.n_stations, l.population_per_station
ORDER BY investment_priority_score DESC;

datasets.name: 7f329015
queryLines:
-- Query 1C: Cumulative population impact
SELECT 
    city,
    population_at_risk,
    SUM(population_at_risk) OVER (ORDER BY avg_pm25 DESC) AS cumulative_population,
    ROUND(SUM(population_at_risk) OVER (ORDER BY avg_pm25 DESC) * 1.0 / 
          SUM(population_at_risk) OVER (), 1) AS cumulative_pct
FROM (
    SELECT l.city, l.population AS population_at_risk, AVG(f.pm25_median) AS avg_pm25
    FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
    JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_locations l ON f.country = l.country
    WHERE f.country = 'NG'
    GROUP BY l.city, l.population

-- Query 2A: Nigeria vs World Comparison
SELECT 
    country,
    COUNT(DISTINCT city) AS n_cities,
    SUM(population) AS total_population,
    SUM(n_stations) AS total_stations,
    ROUND(SUM(population) / NULLIF(SUM(n_stations), 0), 0) AS people_per_station,
    ROUND(AVG(avg_pm25), 2) AS simple_avg_pm25,
    ROUND(SUM(avg_pm25 * population) / SUM(population), 2) AS population_weighted_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(pm25_exceedance_pct), 1) AS avg_exceedance_pct,
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(avg_pm25) > 50 THEN 'Tier 4 - Critical'
        WHEN AVG(avg_pm25) > 30 THEN 'Tier 3 - High Concern'
        WHEN AVG(avg_pm25) > 15 THEN 'Tier 2 - Moderate'
        ELSE 'Tier 1 - Good'
    END AS country_tier
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world
-- WHERE city != 'National Average'
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY population_weighted_pm25 DESC;

datasets.name: 9a6e3e2e
queryLines:
-- Query 2B: Nigeria's position in global rankings
WITH country_rankings AS (
    SELECT 
        country,
        ROUND(SUM(avg_pm25 * population) / SUM(population), 2) AS population_weighted_pm25,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(avg_pm25 * population) / SUM(population) DESC) AS pollution_rank
    FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world
    -- WHERE city != 'National Average'
    GROUP BY country
)
SELECT 
    *,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world) AS total_countries,
    CONCAT('Rank ', pollution_rank, ' of ', 
           (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world)) AS ranking_display
FROM country_rankings
-- WHERE country = 'NG';

columns.expression:
CASE 
  WHEN country = 'NG' THEN pollution_rank
END

datasets.name: 02f48358
queryLines:
-- Query 2C: Infrastructure gap analysis
SELECT 
    country,
    SUM(n_stations) AS total_stations,
    SUM(population) AS total_population,
    ROUND(SUM(n_stations) * 1000000.0 / SUM(population), 2) AS stations_per_million_people,
    ROUND((SUM(n_stations) * 1000000.0 / SUM(population)) / 
          (SELECT SUM(n_stations) * 1000000.0 / SUM(population) 
           FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world 
           WHERE country = 'NG') * 1, 0) AS pct_of_nigeria_density
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.view_nigeria_vs_world
-- WHERE city != 'National Average'
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY stations_per_million_people DESC;

datasets.name: 447eb74e
queryLines:
-- Query 3A: Year-over-year trend analysis
SELECT 
    f.city,
    d.year,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median) - LAG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city ORDER BY d.year), 2) AS yoy_change,
    ROUND((AVG(f.pm25_median) - LAG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city ORDER BY d.year)) / 
          NULLIF(LAG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city ORDER BY d.year), 0) * 1, 1) AS yoy_change_pct,
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(f.pm25_median) > LAG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city ORDER BY d.year) * 1.05 
        THEN '🔴 Worsening'
        WHEN AVG(f.pm25_median) < LAG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city ORDER BY d.year) * 0.95 
        THEN '🟢 Improving'
        ELSE '🟡 Stable'
    END AS trend_indicator
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE f.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY f.city, d.year
ORDER BY f.city, d.year;

datasets.name: 21b768ec
queryLines:
-- -- Query 3B: Seasonal pattern analysis (Nigeria-specific: Dry vs Rainy)
-- SELECT 
--     f.city,
--     CASE 
--         WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry Season (Harmattan)'
--         ELSE 'Rainy Season'
--     END AS season,
--     ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
--     ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median), 2) AS avg_pm10,
--     ROUND(MIN(f.pm25_median), 2) AS min_pm25,
--     ROUND(MAX(f.pm25_median), 2) AS max_pm25,
--     COUNT(*) AS n_days
-- FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
-- JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
-- WHERE f.country = 'NG'
-- GROUP BY f.city, season
-- ORDER BY f.city, season;


SELECT 
    f.city,
    CASE 
        WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry Season (Harmattan)'
        ELSE 'Rainy Season'
    END AS season,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median), 2) AS avg_pm10,
    ROUND(MIN(f.pm25_median), 2) AS min_pm25,
    ROUND(MAX(f.pm25_median), 2) AS max_pm25,
    COUNT(*) AS n_days
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d 
    ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE f.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY 
    f.city,
    CASE 
        WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry Season (Harmattan)'
        ELSE 'Rainy Season'
    END
ORDER BY f.city, season;

datasets.name: cd80bee2
queryLines:
-- Query 3C: Weekly patterns (weekday vs weekend)
SELECT 
    f.city,
    CASE WHEN d.is_weekend THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END AS day_type,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 2) AS avg_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(f.no2_median), 2) AS avg_no2,
    COUNT(*) AS n_days,
    -- Weekend effect
    ROUND((AVG(f.pm25_median) - AVG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city)) / 
          AVG(AVG(f.pm25_median)) OVER (PARTITION BY f.city) * 1, 1) AS deviation_from_city_avg_pct
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE f.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY f.city, day_type
ORDER BY f.city, day_type;

datasets.name: 4fc33e99
queryLines:
-- Query 3D: Multi-year trend with linear regression slope
SELECT 
    city,
    MIN(year) AS start_year,
    MAX(year) AS end_year,
    ROUND(MIN(avg_pm25), 2) AS baseline_pm25,
    ROUND(MAX(avg_pm25), 2) AS current_pm25,
    ROUND((MAX(avg_pm25) - MIN(avg_pm25)) / (MAX(year) - MIN(year)), 2) AS annual_change_rate,
    CASE 
        WHEN (MAX(avg_pm25) - MIN(avg_pm25)) / (MAX(year) - MIN(year)) > 1 THEN 'ACCELERATING CRISIS'
        WHEN (MAX(avg_pm25) - MIN(avg_pm25)) / (MAX(year) - MIN(year)) > 0 THEN 'Worsening'
        WHEN (MAX(avg_pm25) - MIN(avg_pm25)) / (MAX(year) - MIN(year)) < -1 THEN 'Improving Rapidly'
        ELSE 'Stable/Slight Improvement'
    END AS trend_classification
FROM (
    SELECT f.city, d.year, AVG(f.pm25_median) AS avg_pm25
    FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
    JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
    WHERE f.country = 'NG'
    GROUP BY f.city, d.year
)
GROUP BY city
ORDER BY annual_change_rate DESC;

datasets.name: daeac2c4
queryLines:
-- Query 4A: Pollutant exceedance frequency
SELECT 
    'PM2.5' AS pollutant,
    15.0 AS who_guideline,
    ROUND(AVG(pm25_median), 2) AS nigeria_avg,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pm25_median > 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS exceedance_pct,
    COUNT(*) AS total_measurements
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily
WHERE country = 'NG' AND pm25_median IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 'PM10', 45.0, ROUND(AVG(pm10_median), 2), 
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pm10_median > 45 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1),
       COUNT(*)
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily
WHERE country = 'NG' AND pm10_median IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 'NO2', 25.0, ROUND(AVG(no2_median), 2),
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN no2_median > 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1),
       COUNT(*)
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily
WHERE country = 'NG' AND no2_median IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY exceedance_pct DESC;

datasets.name: 35aa468d
queryLines:
-- -- Query 4B: Pollutant correlation matrix
-- SELECT 
--     ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, pm10_median), 3) AS pm25_pm10_correlation,
--     ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, no2_median), 3) AS pm25_no2_correlation,
--     ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, o3_median), 3) AS pm25_o3_correlation,
--     ROUND(CORR(no2_median, pm10_median), 3) AS no2_pm10_correlation,
--     ROUND(CORR(no2_median, CAST(d.is_weekend AS INT64)), 3) AS no2_weekend_correlation
-- FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
-- JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
-- WHERE f.country = 'NG';

-- Query 4B: Pollutant correlation matrix
SELECT 
    ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, pm10_median), 3) AS pm25_pm10_correlation,
    ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, no2_median), 3) AS pm25_no2_correlation,
    ROUND(CORR(pm25_median, o3_median), 3) AS pm25_o3_correlation,
    ROUND(CORR(no2_median, pm10_median), 3) AS no2_pm10_correlation,
    ROUND(CORR(no2_median, CAST(d.is_weekend AS INT)), 3) AS no2_weekend_correlation
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d 
    ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE f.country = 'NG';

datasets.name: f5bd510e
queryLines:
-- Query 4C: City-specific pollutant profiles
SELECT 
    city,
    ROUND(AVG(pm25_median), 1) AS pm25_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(pm10_median), 1) AS pm10_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(no2_median), 1) AS no2_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(so2_median), 1) AS so2_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(pm25_median), 0), 2) AS pm10_pm25_ratio,
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(pm25_median), 0) > 2.5 THEN 'Dust-dominant (Harmattan/Desert)'
        WHEN AVG(no2_median) > 30 THEN 'Traffic-dominant (Urban)'
        WHEN AVG(so2_median) > 20 THEN 'Industrial-dominant'
        ELSE 'Mixed sources'
    END AS primary_source_category
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily
WHERE country = 'NG'
GROUP BY city
ORDER BY pm25_avg DESC;

datasets.name: 3a2a6253
queryLines:
-- -- Query 4D: Seasonal source attribution
-- SELECT 
--     CASE 
--         WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry/Harmattan'
--         ELSE 'Rainy'
--     END AS season,
--     ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median), 1) AS avg_pm10,
--     ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 1) AS avg_pm25,
--     ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(f.pm25_median), 0), 2) AS pm10_pm25_ratio,
--     -- Ratio >2.5 indicates dust, <2.0 indicates combustion
--     CASE 
--         WHEN AVG(f.pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(f.pm25_median), 0) > 2.5 THEN 'High dust contribution'
--         ELSE 'Combustion-dominated'
--     END AS source_interpretation
-- FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
-- JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d ON f.date_key = d.date_key
-- WHERE f.country = 'NG'
-- GROUP BY season;
-- Query 4D: Seasonal source attribution
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry/Harmattan'
        ELSE 'Rainy'
    END AS season,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median), 1) AS avg_pm10,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm25_median), 1) AS avg_pm25,
    ROUND(AVG(f.pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(f.pm25_median), 0), 2) AS pm10_pm25_ratio,
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(f.pm10_median) / NULLIF(AVG(f.pm25_median), 0) > 2.5 
        THEN 'High dust contribution'
        ELSE 'Combustion-dominated'
    END AS source_interpretation
FROM air_quality.`03_gold`.fact_air_quality_daily f
JOIN air_quality.`03_gold`.dim_dates d 
    ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE f.country = 'NG'
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN d.month IN (11, 12, 1, 2, 3) THEN 'Dry/Harmattan'
        ELSE 'Rainy'
    END;
